w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: My entry was based on a downtrend breakout retest, I
price was making good lower high and lower lows, price broke from a lower low, came back to retest price then I entered, as you can see my stop lo
is below the newly formed high low which eventually broke the resistance line and my take
is below the downtrends lower high which is the highest orange circle, as we are still in a downtrend I didn’t test the market and put my
closer to the lower high power as its still making healthy lower highs and lower lows -> image1

wp:docPr.name: Picture 1
wp:docPr.descr:
The image shows a technical chart for gold prices in USD, displaying various technical indicators and current price levels.
AI-generated content may be incorrect.

pic:cNvPr.name: Picture 1
pic:cNvPr.descr:
The image shows a technical chart for gold prices in USD, displaying various technical indicators and current price levels.
AI-generated content may be incorrect.

w:r.w:t: breaking a level that has been retested 3 times prior, stop loss was place above previous lower high, if it doesn’t support then it invalidates my trade, take profit was based on the lower high all the way to the right, I noticed it was bounced of 2/3 times before breaking it so there was a good chance it would bounce of it again so I placed my trade before that level. -> image2

wp:docPr.name: Picture 1
wp:docPr.descr:
The image shows a technical chart for gold futures (XAUUSD) with various technical indicators and price levels.

pic:cNvPr.name: Picture 1
pic:cNvPr.descr:
The image shows a technical chart for gold futures (XAUUSD) with various technical indicators and price levels.
AI-generated content may be incorrect.

w:r.w:t: Entry was based on retesting a level that was retested twice as you can see by the first 2 circles I marked so once it broke downwards and came back up to retest I entered, stop loss was placed below the previous lower high which is the 3
circle in the screenshot, if it breaks that then trade is invalidated, take profit was just calculated with a 2-3RR based on where I placed my stop loss, no previous prices dictated where my
would be calculated based on where my stop loss is until there is a previous supported or resisted level that might interfere with where my take profit goes. -> image3

w:r.w:t: and price breaking a supported line and coming back to retest the newly formed resistance line, stop loss was based on previous lower consolidation level which could also be seen as a lower low level, take profit was calculated on 1
where my stop loss was so make it 3r:r and
based on where the previous level broke out of the downtrend which can be seen in the first circle. -

w:r.w:t: Entry was based on a retest of a support level during a down trend
, each circle represents when price touched this support level, it then broke its down trend structure but for extra confirmation it came back to the support and retested of that leve
l which led the trade to reaching the take profit
, another indication would be that SMMA crossed
SL was placed below the previous lower
low level which the second circle highlights and take profit is just 3x that but also below the previous
high level before price started moving down.

w:r.w:t: Entry was based on a repeated touch of a support level which you can see where the circles are placed, so I just waited for price
to break that level and once it did and retested I entered the trad
e, you can see that WMA crossed above SMMA as well and stopped consolidating which indicates another movement in price,
stop loss was based on the previous higher level it made which you can see on the 4
circle I’ve marked and take profit was just

pic:cNvPr.descr:
The image shows a technical chart for gold (XAUUSD) and the U.S. dollar (USD) with various technical indicators.
AI-generated content may be incorrect.

w:r.w:t: I entered as I identified price was respecting a down trend level and wasn’t breaking it so I thought if price does break then I will enter if price continues to follow momentum, now
there was no retest in price before I entered but
breaking a respected line + a strong show in liquidity and momentum being present allowed me to enter this trade. Stop loss was placed below the previous
higher low level which was created after price broke the
downward trend line, take profit was just 3x based on where my stop loss was but still below the previous high prior entering this downtrend, so where the first circle is present.

wp:docPr.name: Picture 1
wp:docPr.descr:

pic:cNvPr.name: Picture 1

w:r.w:t: Now this trade was a loss however I entered
due to identifying a reversal in price, now
price was on the uptrend but it started to break and consolidate about the previous higher low level that it created and I though it price breaks below this it would be an opportunity to enter,
price did break below this level as you can see however there were not enough
visuals on price actually respecting that level before breaking it, so once I saw price came back to touch the level for the second time I entered which resulted in a loss, stop loss was above
the high of the level before breaking the high low level.
so I don’t regret the trade

wp:docPr.name: Picture 1
wp:docPr.descr:
The image displays a technical chart for the XAUUSD (Gold Spot / U.S. Dollar) with various technical indicators such as WMA (Weighted Mov Average), SMMA (Simple Moving Average), and Chimoku. The chart shows the current price at 4,780.00, with a high of 4,764.90 and a low of 4,513.655.

AI-generated content may be incorrect.

w:r.w:t: due to price being on a down trend, breaking the lower high (first circle)
then coming back down to rest, SMMA crossing above WMA
and clean prices present then I went for the long, stop loss
newly formed higher low and take profit 3x the stop loss

w:r.w:t: I entered this trade due to identifying a potential downtrend coming,
I noticed price respected a level twice so I waited for it to break and retest back to that level treating it as a new resistance level
, WMA also crossed above SMMA so I entered this sell position
the trade hit my stop loss
. Stop loss was placed above the previous higher high which you can see on the highest circle I marked, take profit was just 3x

w:r.w:t: I entered this trade due to breakout of a downward movement
it broke its previous lower high before coming back down to
touch the level again, which is where I entered the trade, stop loss was placed below the previous lower low
, take profit was 3R:R based on my stop loss level.

w:r.w:t: due to price breaking previous high
and retesting it, my mistake was not look at the trend of the chart on a bigger time frame was well, as we can see from this trade we are clearly in a downtrend
but once I saw a level was respected, price broke through and came back to retest I entered, another mistake was
making a long trade when we were on a downtrend, it should’ve been
short trades only with the current patterns that were being shown. Stop loss was placed below previous
higher low and take profit was 3x the stop loss.

w:r.w:t: I entered this trade due to the respect of an inclined support level and once it broke and
I entered, placed my stop loss
above the previous high level which is shown on the 3
and closing at my take profit.
This is a trade I never got to enter unfortunately, I noticed an uptrend in price which was making healthy higher highs and higher lows,

now I noticed price broke the trend so I was looking for a retest at one of the 2 levels I circled so I could enter a short position but price never came back up making me miss the trade. My stop loss was calculated based on the previous higher
so I placed my level above it and made the trade a

w:r.w:t: Entry was based on a consistent t
ouch of a support/resistance level starting
from the first circle I marked,

as you can see it broke under then above but I still did not enter due to the fact that it did not break the previous lower high but rather came back to touch that level, I was waiting for price to break the previous lower high then touch the support
level again then I entered. Stop loss was based on the most recent level that was underneath the support
circle and take profit was 3x that

w:r.w:t: respecting a level countless times so once price broke underneath it
I waited for price to come back up to that level where the 5
circle is located then I entered, stop loss was based on the 4
circle as that was the most recent consolidation high level so stop loss was placed
above it, and take profit was 3x that but also above the
price before price shot up to the consolidation zone. The trade looks like it didn’t touch take
did as you can see in the future levels price went to.

broke past that level and came back to retest, stop loss was based on the previous lower high before price broke the support and take profit was 3x

w:r.w:t: This short entry was based on the respected support level, it was already on a downtrend so looking for a short was the right decision, price broke that respected level and came back to touch the newly formed resistance line as you can see on the 4
circle I marked, stop loss was based on the 4
the previous lower high so I placed the stop loss just above it, then take profit was 3x my stop loss level.

, retested it around 3 4 times before it broke then came to retest it which signalled for a short position,
WMA also broke above the SMMA which is another signal,
stop loss was placed above the 3
circle as that was the previous lower high before price broke the support line, take profit was

w:r.w:t: Entry was based on a supported level, as price broke above then came to retest the level
as you can see on the 3
circle I entered the trade and placed the stop loss below the previous

lower high before price broke the support level, unfortunately the trade was a loss and looking at the bigger picture price was still in a downtrend but it didn’t go in my favour which wasn’t a surprise.

w:r.w:t: based on noticing a downtrend appearing, so I waited for price to break the support level that it seemed to support and bounce off of, once price eventually broke
I waited for a retest then entered the trade, stop loss was based on the 3
circle I labelled which could be seen as the previous lower high level then take profit was 3x that.

was due to the fact I wanted to trade a short position when price was clearing in an uptrend movement. Anyways price broke the support line and turned it into a resistance line so once I saw that price came back to touch the resistance level I entered but unfor

w:r.w:t: As you can see price was on a
but you could see hesitation in its actions, price broke a strong lower high level which indicates a reversal in
so I waited for price to come back down and retest the newly founded support level which it
did and I entered. Stop loss was based on the previous lower high level before it broke the resistance level which you could see at the 2
then take profit was 3x that and below a strong lower high level that it created previously.

a support level, then went on to breaking that support and a stronger indication was the fact that price broke the previous higher high levels which indicates a reversal so I just waited for price to come back and retest the old support level which turned into a resistance level which you can see on the 3
Stop loss was based on the previous higher high level and take profit was 3
